So we can take that as a given. So Antwan is truthful. Then Helene says that Antwan tells the truth. If Sal is lying, then his statement would be false, implying Gwenn lies, but we already know Gwenn tells the truth. Therefore, Sal must be truthful. Now, Shaunda says that Sal lies.
